attributes.action: Include Slough in the London Oyster fare zone
attributes.additional_details: Despite direct Elizabeth Line access and close ties to London, Slough remains outside Oyster zones, making travel much more expensive for commuters. At a time of rising living costs, this creates an unfair divide compared with nearby areas. Extending fare zones would improve affordability, support workers and businesses, and encourage public transport use.
attributes.background: Despite direct Elizabeth Line links and strong ties to London, Slough remains outside Oyster zones, creating unfair travel costs. We urge the Government to review fare boundaries and work with TfL to include Slough, supporting commuters, local growth and regional connectivity

rejection.details:
We can't accept your petition because the UK Government and Parliament aren't responsible for the issue you raise. It is the responsibility of Transport for London, the Mayor of London and the London Assembly.

The London Assembly has its own petitions process. You can find out more about how to petition the London Assembly here: https://www.london.gov.uk/about-us/london-assembly/petitions
